name: @intentsolutionsio/cross-chain-bridge-monitor
description: Monitor cross-chain bridge activity, track transfers, analyze security, and detect bridge exploits

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install cross-chain-bridge-monitor\\n  or /plugin install cross-chain-bridge-monitor@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
